products.name: Carrier H6 Electric
products.descriptor: battery-powered heavy-lift hexacopter, 8 kg payload, 48-minute flight time

evidence.snippet:
The **Carrier H6 Electric** is a long-duration, heavy-lift hexacopter powered by smart lithium polymer batteries. It’s ideal when you need a clean electric platform—while still supporting serious payload versatility for surveying, payload deployment, search & rescue equipment, and thermal imaging missions.
**Highlights**
*   **8 kg max payload (17.6 lbs)**
*   **48 minute** flight time

products.name: Carrier H6 Hybrid
products.descriptor: gas-electric hybrid hexacopter with 2.4 kW EFI generator, 5 kg payload, up to 5-hour endurance

evidence.snippet:
The **Carrier H6 Hybrid EFI** is a high-endurance, gas-electric hybrid built around a **2.4kW electronic fuel injection generator** for long-duration missions. It’s optimized for applications like LiDAR surveying, photogrammetry, corridor mapping, and utility inspections—where staying airborne longer reduces battery swaps and increases daily coverage.
**Highlights**
*   **5 kg max payload**

products.name: Carrier H6 Hydrone
products.descriptor: hydrogen fuel-cell hybrid hexacopter, near-silent, up to 2.5-hour endurance, 5 kg payload

evidence.snippet: The **Carrier H6 Hydrone** is a hybrid electric drone powered by a hydrogen fuel cell, designed for extended endurance while maintaining the **nearly silent operation** of an electric platform. It’s equipped with [Intelligent Energy](chatgpt://generic-entity?number=1)’s **2.4kW fuel cell power module**, delivering long flight times for scientific-grade sensors such as multispectral cameras, professional DSLRs, and LiDAR.

products.notes: Product page (harrisaerial.com/hx8-tether/) was not fetched; named consistently in site navigation under Carrier Drones.

products.name: C-GCS
products.descriptor: professional GCS with 19-inch HD sunlight-viewable display and HOTAS controls

evidence.snippet: Introducing our Professional Ground Control Station with a daylight-viewable 19 inch HD Video Display, Mission Planning Screen, Smooth 3-axis joystick, and much more. C-GCS is fully compatible with all of Harris Aerial’s Carrier drones and easily integrated with most third-party drone platforms. C-GCS is a revolutionary break-through in safe and easy operation of unmanned aerial vehicles

products.name: C-NAVIGATOR
products.descriptor: compact rugged NDAA-compliant handheld GCS with broadband datalink and mission planning

evidence.snippet:
C-NAVIGATOR
-----------
##### Carrier Navigator
C-NAVIGATOR is Harris Aerial’s compact and rugged NDAA compliant handheld Ground Control Station.  C-NAVIGATOR combines rugged design, powerful computing, and a strong broadband datalink to make the ultimate GCS.  Harris Aerial’s HA Ground Control software enables real-time telemetry information, video streaming, sensor control, and mission planning all from a single controller.
C-NAVIGATOR is fully compliant with the 2020 National Defense Authorization Act, Sec 848.

products.name: C-SRoC
products.descriptor: military soldier robotic controller GCS on Panasonic FZ-S1 with Nett Warrior port, NDAA-compliant

evidence.snippet:
C-SRoC
------
##### Soldier Robotic Controller
Introducing the SRoC (Soldier Robotic Controller): A Ruggedized GCS with Advanced Features, built on the robust Panasonic FZ-S1, offers a standardized, non-customizable solution designed for modern GCS users in defense robotics.
C-SRoC is fully compliant with the 2020 National Defense Authorization Act, Sec 848.

products.name: Phoenix miniRanger 3
products.descriptor: compact UAV LiDAR scanner with 360° FOV, 250 m range, sold by Harris Aerial

evidence.snippet:
#### Build the system you need to meet the growing demands of your clients in varying industries, from mining to agriculture and construction to forestry.
*   Ideal for heavy-lifting Carrier HX8 AND Carrier H6 platforms
*   Survey-Grade (cm-level) accuracy with 250m+ laser range and outstanding intensity calibration on high altitude and high speed missions

products.notes: Third-party product from Phoenix LiDAR Systems sold/integrated by Harris Aerial.

products.name: Sentera 6X Multispectral Sensor
products.descriptor: 6-band multispectral imaging payload for precision agriculture on Carrier drones

evidence.snippet:
Sentera 6X Multispectral Sensor
===============================
###### Six Spectral Bands. Field-Level Crop Intelligence.

The Sentera 6X captures six discrete spectral bands — including Red Edge and Near-Infrared — enabling NDVI, NDRE, and advanced vegetation index mapping that standard RGB drone cameras simply cannot produce. Paired with Harris Aerial's heavy-lift Carrier drones, the 6X covers hundreds of acres per mission with calibrated, agronomically actionable data.

products.notes: Third-party product from Sentera sold/integrated by Harris Aerial; dedicated product page on harrisaerial.com.
